title: Battement de coeur
writer: Michel Duran, Max Kolpé, Hans Wilhelm
actors: Danielle Darrieux, Claude Dauphin, André Luguet
plot: Danielle Darrieux plays an impoverished reform-school escapee who finds a new lease on life when she enrolls in a school for pickpockets run by Fagin-like Saturnin-Fabre.
